title: Ingest public crypto OHLCV/L2 to validate the crypto high-vol lottery sleeve
source: Organizer update 2026-06-16 (via CEO): crypto absent from the parquet drop; org says crypto feeds are widely available online -> use public sources for referencing.
why: The parquet drop has ZERO crypto (B0185/reference-l2-data-drop), so the crypto-only lottery sleeve (B0151, DONE) and any crypto edge could not be backtested. The organizer has now given a casual go-ahead to use public crypto feeds (Binance et al.) for reference 'in the meantime' (NOT a formal ruling that public data is competition-grade -- confirm fill fidelity + whether crypto trades against an official feed at launch in #rules-and-faq). This matters NOW because the B0183 variance sweep showed reaching top-100 requires ~4-8%/day book volatility delivered via a BOUNDED sleeve, and crypto (BTC/ETH/SOL, all live-tradable on MT5) is the natural high-vol engine for that sleeve. Public crypto OHLCV (and L2 from exchange depth endpoints) lets us calibrate the sleeve's variance, carry drag, and forced-liq envelope against real crypto dynamics before the Jun 21 freeze.
value_rationale: Unblocks empirical sizing of the only instrument class capable of producing the variance the tournament sim says we need. Directly feeds B0182 (posture/rung) and the barbell Stage-2 calibration.
scope: Pull public crypto OHLCV for BTCUSD/ETHUSD/SOLUSD (e.g. Binance klines) covering at least the parquet window (2026-05-11->06-10) plus deep history for vol estimation.
Optionally pull public L2/depth snapshots if a crypto OSR/lead-lag variant is to be tested (BTC->ETH/SOL).
Estimate realized daily vol + overnight carry to size the bounded sleeve to a target book vol (~4-8%/day per the sweep).
Reconcile public crypto prices against MT5 live quotes (basis/spread) so the backtest matches the live venue.
Feed calibrated sleeve parameters into B0182 and the operations runbook lottery-rung ladder.
recommendation: Source public crypto data and calibrate the bounded sleeve's variance/forced-liq envelope; keep it isolated (B0150 latch) so a bad draw cannot cause margin wipeout (= elimination, rules sec14).
out_of_scope: Deploying a crypto directional edge (none validated); building a live crypto data pipeline beyond what's needed for sleeve calibration.

history.reason: Organizer sanctioned public crypto feeds; variance sweep shows crypto is the natural high-vol engine for the bounded sleeve.
Avoid overstating organizer permission re public crypto data

history.reason: CEO directed: calibrate crypto sleeve in parallel with the OSR/L2 edge resolution
Correcting status: B0186 is a not-yet-started proposal (crypto data ingestion), inadvertently created/moved to in_progress
CEO directed: calibrate crypto sleeve in parallel with OSR/L2 edge resolution

Crypto sleeve sizing calibrated (docs/submission/crypto_sleeve_calibration_2026-06-16.md + scripts/crypto_sleeve_calibration.py). Findings: realized daily vol BTC~2%/ETH~3%/SOL~3% (MT5==Binance within 0.2pt). Frozen-mechanism R-dist on 255 real weekly windows = bounded-downside/convex lottery (win 21-27%, meanR~0 = no edge by design, stdR~2, tail +12-20R, losers capped -1R). Book-vol LINEAR in risk_frac (slope ~1.17): 4-8%/day target -> risk_frac in [0.034,0.068]; runbook 0.05 rung = 5.9%/day. Forced-liq SAFE (sec14): worst case bounded at -risk_frac, isolated+latched, fully-pyramided notional <=0.5E -> margin <2%, no wipeout. The 0.05 rung's -5% worst case exceeds the 1.5% portfolio-kill -> MUST raise --portfolio-kill with it (confirms runbook 6.2 coupling). Basis MT5 vs Binance <=0.59% abs-median (date-aligned); carry ~0.11% over 5 nights = second-order. Feeds B0182 rung decision (band [0.034,0.05], lean lower if PCE realizes hot). REMAINING (post-event, can't run pre-freeze): forward sanity on actual FOMC 17-jun / PCE 25-jun; #rules-and-faq confirm crypto official feed + fill fidelity.

Closed the two actionable gaps: (1) operations-runbook 6.2 updated with the calibrated band [0.034,0.068]/0.05=5.9%/day + the mandatory portfolio-kill coupling + the all-days-vs-PCE caveat; (2) live read-only MT5 crypto probe (scripts/mt5_crypto_basis_probe.py) — live spread BTC 1.19/ETH 0.98/SOL 4.00 bps, live basis MT5 vs Binance <=0.07%, confirming the live cost basis matches B0183's ~1.3bps BTC assumption. Remaining items are date/externally gated, tracked elsewhere: forward sanity on the real FOMC-17/PCE-25 prints (FOMC-17 rehearsal runsheet) and #rules-and-faq confirmation crypto trades vs an official feed at launch (B0158).

Crypto sleeve calibration complete and defensible: sizing band [0.034,0.068] for 4-8%/day, sec14-safe, runbook fed, basis/spread reconciled live + historical. Only date-gated forward verification remains (FOMC-17 rehearsal + B0158 org confirmation).
